entity.summary: Solana decentralized exchange and token-market platform providing token swaps, liquidity pools, liquidity provisioning, token creation and launch infrastructure, trading APIs, and market tooling.
entity.notes: Current first-party website, documentation, and application support active DEX classification. The website describes Swap/Pool trading and liquidity provision, while the documentation publishes the Dexlab Swap/Pool Solana program and service URL. HEI models Token Factory, Swap/Pool, APIs, and other product surfaces under one Dexlab entity.

evidence.title: Dexlab
evidence.notes: Current first-party website describes Dexlab's Solana token-market platform and current Swap/Pool product, including liquidity provision, trading, pool creation, and developer API functionality.

evidence.title: Dexlab Docs
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation exposes Token & Swap APIs, DEX Swap/LP Pool documentation, and the Dexlab Swap/Pool Solana program ID and service URL.

evidence.title: Dexlab application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application is reachable and exposes active Dexlab product navigation including Trade, Token Factory, Token Hub, documentation, and wallet-connected product flows.
